problem id: 82ae858c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  10001001 -> 11101010
  11011010 -> 11111110
  00010111 -> 01000101
  10101011 -> 00101110
  00100000 -> 01111011
  11110111 -> 11111101
  10000111 -> 00110011
  10010100 -> 00111101
  10111011 -> 01101110
  11010001 -> 10110101

query: 00110111
predicted answer: 11001101
